name: notation
description: Capture session learnings into the right Claude Code memory tier. /notation:notate grounds itself in the session transcript and project profile, turns each learning into a routed proposal (global CLAUDE.md, ~/.claude/notes/, per-project MEMORY.md, or project docs), and applies them through an interactive picker - with a lean bias that keeps CLAUDE.md small. /notation:notate-all applies every proposal without the picker. Ships a notation-audit skill that flags bloat, stale notes, and orphaned index entries.

author.name: Ryan Robson and Robworks Software LLC
